untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by prior period returns and selecting top N performers (Winner portfolio). This is a cross-sectional/portfolio-level selection strategy that cannot be expressed as a single-stock technical rule using the allowed indicators. The entry condition 'rank stocks by prior period returns' and 'select top performing stocks' requires: (1) universe-wide ranking/sorting logic not supported by point-in-time technical comparisons, and (2) portfolio construction rules rather than entry/exit trigger conditions. Additionally, 'Focus on Big cap stocks for liquidity' requires market cap filtering which is not in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This signal is a factor-based/momentum portfolio strategy designed for cross-sectional stock selection and rebalancing, not a single-security entry/exit rule. It requires: (1) returns ranking across a universe of stocks, (2) percentile-based selection (top X%), and (3) market cap screening. These are portfolio management operations rather than technical indicator conditions. To backtest this properly, use a portfolio optimization/ranking engine with universe filtering rather than a bar-by-bar technical rule engine.
